identity.title: Full Stack Developer & AI Integration Engineer

summary: Full Stack Developer and AI Integration Engineer with 1+ years of experience building and shipping production-grade web, mobile, and AI-powered SaaS platforms using React, Next.js, Node.js, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL. Proven expertise integrating Generative AI APIs and RESTful APIs into scalable cloud systems on AWS (EC2, S3) and Firebase — delivering end-to-end solutions across the full software development lifecycle in Agile environments.
heroSubhead: Architecting production-ready AI pipelines and full-stack cloud ecosystems. I optimize model inference, design secure RAG engines, and build robust software frameworks that drive business outcome.

highlights: Independently architected and delivered 4+ full-stack client projects end-to-end using Next.js, Node.js, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL.
Provisioned AWS infrastructure (EC2, S3) for production environments, reducing per-client hosting overhead by up to 40%.
Spearheaded frontend development of an AI-powered content generation SaaS platform using React 19, serving 500+ active paying subscribers.
Integrated 3+ Generative AI APIs — cutting manual content production time by around 60% and achieving 99%+ uptime across production releases.
Developed cross-platform mobile features in React Native targeting iOS and Android from a unified TypeScript codebase.
Engineered a media upload pipeline using Multer and Cloudinary, supporting reliable image and video handling for 300+ mobile users.

projects.name: Data Lumio
projects.description: AI-powered, no-code data analysis SaaS platform — researchers upload spreadsheets, PDFs, and survey files to clean, visualize, and export insights without writing code.
highlights: Built an AI-powered, no-code data analysis SaaS platform for qualitative and quantitative research.
Implemented Stripe subscription billing, Firebase Auth, and AWS S3 file storage.
Added Google Analytics to drive data-informed product decisions.

projects.name: Maqaam
projects.description: Full-stack Islamic community platform with admin and user portals — map-powered events via OpenStreetMap; role-based admin moderation dashboard.
highlights: Developed dedicated admin and user portals with map-powered event creation.
Designed a normalized PostgreSQL schema with geo-filtering queries.
Secured sessions with JWT authentication and deployed on AWS EC2.

projects.name: PAPU.AI
projects.description: Production AI SaaS — users purchase credits and generate cinematic AI videos, avatars, and images via Google Veo 3 on subscription and pay-per-use tiers.
highlights: Serving 200+ users on subscription and pay-per-use tiers.
Orchestrated a multi-model Generative AI pipeline via FastAPI with Firebase real-time sync and Stripe billing.

projects.name: LIBMAX
projects.description: Cross-platform library management app for University of Wah — book reservations, e-book access, research publications, and campus announcements.
highlights: Serving 1,000+ active users at University of Wah.
Implemented role-based access control (student/faculty) in TypeScript end-to-end.
Cloudinary cloud storage for academic content.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
